response.justification: Candidate has only ~7 months of C/C++ experience at National Instruments (2014-2015) and no Windows-platform C++ work in the past decade. Career has focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web/data domains, with no exposure to capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income. SQL skills are listed generically but no SQL Server/Oracle experience is shown. Does not meet the mandatory C++/Windows or domain requirements.
strengths: Strong overall software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Polyglot engineer with low-latency systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Demonstrated ability to ship across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, ending in 2015
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB and MySQL
Zero capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain experience

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
